title: cerastium alpinum var. beeringianum
intro: Cerastium alpinum var. beeringianum, also known as Beering's Mountain Sandwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum var. beeringianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a useful addition to a natural remedy regimen.
